architecture.summary: gh CLI for PR creation, feature branch stays local until sw:pr, existing branch reused as-is

integrations.summary: gh pr create CLI, existing gh auth, multi-repo parallel PR creation with continue-on-error

performance.summary: N/A - git operations are inherently fast, no performance concerns

security.summary: N/A - uses existing gh auth, no new credentials

edge-cases.summary: Uncommitted changes carry to branch, existing non-matching branch reused, PR conflicts left to human, PR failure warns but does not block closure
